prompt: Use the shameless-script skill. Write a UGC testimonial ad for Shameless Snacks on the 'getting your gut back on track after the holidays' angle. The customer describes how January felt before and after the switch. Format: talking head.
Use the shameless-script skill. Write a narrator ad for Shameless Snacks on the 'your gut does more than digest' angle, timed for cold and flu season. Format: voiceover over b-roll.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a UGC testimonial for Shameless Snacks from a customer whose whole household watches their blood sugar, on why this is the candy they keep in the house. Format: talking head.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a founder-confession ad about why Shameless skipped inulin and chicory root, the fibers that leave people bloated and sprinting to the bathroom. Format: founder to camera.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a narrator ad for Shameless Snacks that tells the viewer exactly what their first week of a daily bag habit looks like. Make it concrete and vivid. Format: voiceover.
Use the shameless-script skill. Write a UGC testimonial for Shameless Snacks aimed at people managing their weight after 40, when the old tricks stop working. Format: talking head.

Use the shameless-script skill. Adapt this competitor ad for Shameless Snacks, keeping the energy: 'This gummy literally makes you lose weight. Customers drop 10 lbs in their first month, guaranteed. Your jeans will thank you.' Format: UGC talking head.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a UGC ad for Shameless Snacks from a mom who found a candy she is happy to drop in the lunchbox, including why she trusts what is in the bag. Format: kitchen vlog.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a founder-confession ad for Shameless Snacks about kids who refuse vegetables, the fiber gap that creates, and where a candy that carries fiber fits. Format: founder to camera.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a narrator ad for Shameless Snacks set at family movie night, contrasting the classic candy bowl with the Shameless bowl and what parents get out of the swap. Format: voiceover.
Use the shameless-script skill. Write a narrator ad for Shameless Snacks for the Ozempic-era snacker whose appetite has shrunk and who wants every bite to count. Format: voiceover.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a UGC testimonial from a customer describing how eating changed after starting a weekly weight-loss injection, and where Shameless fits in the new smaller routine. Format: talking head.

Use the shameless-script skill. Adapt this competitor ad for Shameless Snacks, keep the punch, lose the problems: 'Nature's Ozempic is here. Skip the injection and let this gummy do the work. GLP-1 results without the prescription.' Format: narrator voiceover.
Use the shameless-script skill. Write 5 hooks then a script for Shameless Snacks leaning hard on food noise. Make food noise the spine of every single hook. Format: hooks then UGC script.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a UGC ad for Shameless Snacks built around the current offer. Ad libraries show the brand running up to 58 percent off, so use the strongest version of the deal. Format: unboxing.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a narrator ad comparing what a daily Shameless bag costs against what people pay for fiber supplements and greens powders, positioning it as the smarter spend. Format: voiceover.
Use the shameless-script skill. Write a founder-confession ad for Shameless Snacks announcing a money-back guarantee. Make the guarantee feel bold and specific. Format: founder to camera.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a UGC taste-test ad for the Shameless Berry Blast mixed bag, focused on the five flavors, the colors in the bag, and where they come from. Format: taste test to camera.
Use the shameless-script skill. Write a narrator ad for the Shameless Super Sour bag leading with the calorie stat as the hook. Format: voiceover.

Use the shameless-script skill. Write a narrator ad for the Sweet and Sour All-Stars bag using this brief stat: All-Stars packs 29g of prebiotic fiber per bag, the highest of any SKU. Format: voiceover.
